title: Five product families, developed to your specification
intro: Everything below is made to order inside customers' own programmes — materials, formats, finishes and volumes engineered to specification. Each family links to the facilities that produce it.

items.title: Paper Products
items.body: Gift wrap and rollwrap, tissue paper, papercraft and printed paper goods — rotogravure and offset, foils and finishes, in FSC-certified and high-recycled-content papers.

items.title: Box & Rigid Packaging
items.body: Rigid and suitcase boxes, folding cartons, GMI-certified retail packaging and toy packaging — structurally engineered, colour-governed and shelf-ready.

items.title: Circular Design
items.body: Baskets, ornaments and home accents designed for circularity — waste-eliminating constructions, recycled and renewable fibres, and product lifecycles that oppose linear consumption.

items.title: Handicrafts
items.body: Hand-woven and hand-finished products from Javanese artisan communities, produced to export quality under the NEST handworker standard with fair, audited livelihoods.

items.title: Cut & Sew
items.body: Party costumes, doll clothing and fashion, soft goods and sewn accessories — pattern-making through finished, carded, retail-ready product.
